title: onobrychis mozaffarianii
intro: Onobrychis mozaffarianii, also known as Mozaffarian's bird's-foot trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to Iran and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis mozaffarianii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
